scripts.transpileDependencies: node ./scripts/transpile-model-deps.mjs --cache-dir ./.cache/sidecars --in-file ./scripts/modelDependencies_source.purs --out-file ./src/core/modelDependencies.purs || echo '[transpile] skipping (no versions or offline)'
scripts.prebuild: node ./scripts/transpile-model-deps.mjs --cache-dir ./.cache/sidecars --in-file ./scripts/modelDependencies_source.purs --out-file ./src/core/modelDependencies.purs || echo '[transpile] skipping (no versions or offline)'
scripts.build: pnpm run fmt && pnpm exec spago build && rollup -c
scripts.build:node: pnpm exec spago build && rollup -c rollup.node.config.js
scripts.test:layer1: pnpm exec spago build && ROLLUP_INPUT=./output/Test.Layer1/index.js ROLLUP_OUTPUT=./dist/test.layer1.node.js rollup -c rollup.node.config.js && node dist/test.layer1.node.js
scripts.test:layer2: pnpm exec spago build && ROLLUP_INPUT=./output/Test.Layer2/index.js ROLLUP_OUTPUT=./dist/test.layer2.node.js rollup -c rollup.node.config.js && node dist/test.layer2.node.js
scripts.test:layer3: pnpm exec spago build && ROLLUP_INPUT=./output/Test.Layer3/index.js ROLLUP_OUTPUT=./dist/test.layer3.node.js rollup -c rollup.node.config.js && node dist/test.layer3.node.js
scripts.test:node: pnpm exec spago build && ROLLUP_INPUT=./output/Test.Main/index.js ROLLUP_OUTPUT=./dist/test.node.js rollup -c rollup.node.config.js && node dist/test.node.js
